TrueType fixtures — source and licensing
=========================================

Three tiny TTFs from the Google Noto project, redistributed here under
the SIL Open Font License v1.1 (see OFL.txt). Chosen for three reasons:

  1. Small (5–8 KiB each), keeping the fixture directory reviewable.
  2. Format-4 (BMP) cmap only — keeps v1 scope tight. Format-12
     (supplementary planes) fonts are a v2 corpus concern.
  3. Diverse glyph counts (29 / 41 / 44) so the oracle comparison
     isn't trivially degenerate.

Fixtures
--------

  buhid.ttf      — Noto Sans Buhid Regular
                   44 glyphs, unitsPerEm 1000.
                   Upstream: notofonts.github.io / noto-fonts

  buginese.ttf   — Noto Sans Buginese Regular
                   41 glyphs, unitsPerEm 1000.
                   Upstream: notofonts.github.io / noto-fonts

  tagbanwa.ttf   — Noto Sans Tagbanwa Regular
                   29 glyphs, unitsPerEm 1000.
                   Upstream: notofonts.github.io / noto-fonts

All three were copied from the macOS system font library
(/System/Library/Fonts/Supplemental/Noto Sans*), which redistributes
Google's original Noto build. The original upstream at
https://notofonts.github.io/ carries the same OFL.
